Package org.apache.juneau.microservice.tomcat

Class TomcatServerComponent

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.microservice.tomcat.TomcatServerComponent
All Implemented Interfaces:
MicroserviceListener
public class TomcatServerComponent extends Object implements MicroserviceListener
Drives the embedded Tomcat server lifecycle on behalf of the microservice via the MicroserviceListener fan-out.

Contributed by TomcatConfiguration as a @Bean. The microservice's Microservice.start() call invokes onStart(Microservice), which:

  1. Picks the first available port from the resolved ports (falling back to Tomcat/port config, then Tomcat-Port manifest, then 8000).
  2. Resolves the Tomcat instance — preferring an externally-supplied @Bean Tomcat, otherwise building one programmatically via the TomcatServerFactory against a writable base directory.
  3. Mounts servlets from Tomcat/servlets, Tomcat/servletMap, Tomcat/servletAttributes config sections, plus auto-mounts every @Bean Servlet whose runtime class is annotated with @Rest (at Rest.path(), or "/" when no path is set).
  4. Materializes the connector via Tomcat.getConnector(), starts the server, and publishes the bound port via the availablePort / juneau.serverPort system properties.

onStop(Microservice) performs the inverse: stops and destroys the server gracefully in a worker thread, then deletes the auto-created temp base directory (if one was created).

External callers reach this component via Microservice.getInstance().getBeanStore().getBean(TomcatServerComponent.class).orElseThrow().

See Also:
  • juneau-microservice-tomcat Basics
Since:
10.0.0
